name: 反应动力学（速率/活化能/催化剂）
subject: chemistry
domain_name: 反应性 2 · 化学变化 Reactivity 2 · How Much, How Fast, How Far
curriculum_points: Describe the factors that affect the rate of a chemical reaction (concentration, pressure, temperature, surface area, catalyst) in terms of collision theory (AO2).

Analyze concentration-time and rate-concentration graphs to deduce zero-, first-, and second-order reactions, and determine the rate expression and the value of the rate constant, k, from initial rates data (AO2, AO3).

interactive_resources.pdb_hint: 搜索 RCSB PDB 数据库获取分子 ID，常见: H2O=1H2O, NaCl=1NAC, C2H5OH=1EHT
interactive_resources.description: 3Dmol.js 化学分子三维结构展示
GeoGebra 化学计量比可视化

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「反应动力学（速率/活化能/催化剂）」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：Describe the factors that affect the rate of a chemical reaction (concentration, pressure, temperature, surface area, ca…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：Analyze concentration-time and rate-concentration graphs to deduce zero-, first-… 对理解「反应动力学（速率/活化能/催化剂）」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
